closed_world.value: Small town setting with bus station, hardware store, and garage office
closed_world.quote: A white prison van pulled up before the small bus station

investigator.value: Izzy - aspiring detective operating from garage office
investigator.quote: client comes to me, I find out what they want to know and give them satisfaction

social_world.value: Prison system hierarchy and ex-convict marginalization - parolee struggling for legitimacy in conventional society
social_world.quote: the waitress had already made him for a parolee, even though he had his sleeves rolled down to cover his mostly

investigator_wound.value: Self-doubt about professional competence and physical inadequacy - wannabe detective with no clients
investigator_wound.quote: god, his face did remind him of a weasel. Sharp thin features, lean to the point of boniness
